description: Defines wall-clock limits, token budgets, estimated cost fields, confidence/source rules, timeout handling, and cost-overrun escalation for AI worker telemetry.

softLimitMinutes.description: Target completion time. Worker should self-report progress at this boundary.

hardLimitMinutes.description: Absolute cutoff. Worker MUST publish partial progress before this boundary.

extensionMinutes.description: Additional time granted if progress is being made at hard limit.

estimatedInputTokens.description: Estimated input token count for the worker session. Set at launch time.

estimatedOutputTokens.description: Estimated output token count for the worker session. Set at launch time.

actualInputTokens.description: Actual input token count captured after worker completion.

actualOutputTokens.description: Actual output token count captured after worker completion.

estimatedCostUsd.description: Estimated cost in USD for the worker session. Derived from token estimates and model pricing.

actualCostUsd.description: Actual cost in USD captured after worker completion.

pricingReference.description: Model pricing used for token-to-cost calculation. Update when Anthropic changes pricing.

high.description: 3+ telemetry signals agree (heartbeat, token count, wall-clock).

low.description: 1 telemetry signal only. Requires manual verification.

sourceHierarchy.description: Token/cost data from Anthropic API response headers. Most authoritative.
Wall-clock and state data from the heartbeat monitor.
Token/cost estimates from the worker's own telemetry output.
Pre-launch estimates based on task complexity. Least authoritative.

onSoftLimit.description: Worker logs a warning and self-reports progress. No forced action.

onHardLimit.description: Worker commits partial progress and opens a PR or comments a blocker on the issue.

onExtensionExpiry.description: Worker MUST publish whatever is available. No further extensions.

staleDetection.description: Mirrors heartbeat monitor thresholds. See worker-heartbeat.md.

warningAtPercent.description: Emit warning when actual cost reaches this percentage of budget.

criticalAtPercent.description: Emit critical alert and consider pausing worker.

hardStopAtPercent.description: Force-stop worker if cost exceeds this percentage of budget.

escalationActions.description: Log a structured warning. Worker continues.
Notify orchestrator. Worker may be paused or have budget increased.
Worker publishes partial progress and terminates.

overridePolicy.description: Human operators may override cost limits per-task via the task JSON budgets field.

telemetrySnapshot.description: Fields added to the heartbeat monitor snapshot for budget telemetry.

costEstimateUsd.description: Running cost estimate based on actual tokens consumed.

wallClockUsedPercent.description: Percentage of hard wall-clock limit consumed.

budgetConfidence.description: Confidence level of the budget telemetry data.
